title: Discrete Logarithm
description: Quantum algorithm for solving discrete logarithm problems: finds x such that g^x ≡ y (mod P). Uses quantum phase estimation and classical post-processing.

params.help: Base g for the discrete logarithm problem. Must be coprime with modulus P.
params.name: g

params.help: Target value y in the equation g^x ≡ y (mod P). Must be coprime with P.
params.name: y

params.help: Modulus P (typically a prime number). Must be coprime with both g and y.
params.name: P
